name: Jeb Bush
subject: Friend, where do we stand?
body:
Friend -

I say it every day on the trail, and I mean it: I need you. I need your prayers. I need your support.

Earlier this month I needed your feedback. Today, I need you to make a contribution ahead of our August End of Month Deadline: [**Jeb2016.com/Donate**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ebpljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcrbdhr_hwhccmfn.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**Friend , there's only 4 days left until our Monday deadline, and we need to raise $200,000 to hit our monthly goal. **

[**Unless you step up with a gift of $100, $50, or $25 right now, we might not hit our mark.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/smsfwcphlkmtjgjbtcdfltzgpptzhgwhfcscmhgbmjkr_hwhccmfn.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

It's a lot to ask, but there's a lot at stake.

[**Can I count on you to chip in $100, $50, $25, or whatever you can afford before midnight on Monday?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ljnpsdhcqnjrzlzmrdypqrflhhrfclscpdwdjclmjzng_hwhccmfn.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**Friend**
**August Supporter:**** Pending**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ahhzrylgsphnbcbmnywzsnvcllnvgcrgzytyhgcmhbpy_hwhccmfn.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Without you, we will not succeed. It's that simple.

[**Friend , can I count on you? **](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/owkgskqnmlwdfpftdkvgmdcpqqdcnpsngkrkwnptwflw_hwhccmfn.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/tvhfsbprjcvkwtwlkbgfjkdtppkdrtsrfbmbvrtlvwcc_hwhccmfn.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=3343&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: John Weaver
subject: Hillary attacked John Kasich
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
As we predicted, Hillary Clinton attacked Gov. John Kasich while she attended a campaign event in Ohio yesterday.

[**Peter, let's show Gov. Kasich that we have his back!**](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30039509:28791373401:m:1:958431888:9CD1B0AFA1C9DAF7E47D0C5C4F5ED8C5:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30039510:28791373401:m:1:958431888:9CD1B0AFA1C9DAF7E47D0C5C4F5ED8C5:r)

**She's on the attack for two reasons:**

**1.** According to a poll this week, Gov. Kasich is the ONLY Republican candidate who is defeating her in New Hampshire right now.

**2.****** According to another poll, Gov. Kasich has a 61% approval rating in Ohio right now.

**Hillary knows she can't win the White House without winning Ohio** \- and she can't win Ohio against Gov. John Kasich.

Gov. John Kasich has a positive and compelling vision for the future of America. **[Let's show our support and ensure that Hillary is defeated!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30039509:28791373401:m:1:958431888:9CD1B0AFA1C9DAF7E47D0C5C4F5ED8C5:r)**

Thanks for all that you're doing to help.

**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist

[

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30039510:28791373401:m:1:958431888:9CD1B0AFA1C9DAF7E47D0C5C4F5ED8C5:r)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: What I want to do about China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,

The stock market has been rocked this past week by bad
news out of China, reminding all of us how much that country's
rise can affect us all.

I'm in Charleston, South Carolina, today to talk about
what I want to do about it. I have a comprehensive plan for China
policy, based on the pillars of the Rubio doctrine, which I laid
out earlier this year.

Those three pillars are restoring American strength,
protecting our economy, and bringing moral clarity back to our
foreign policy.

On China, that means:

Restoring our military presence in the Pacific: I'll
rebuild our military, deploy more forces and conduct more patrols
there, and strengthen our regional alliances.

Making us competitive with China: I'll promote free
trade to strengthen our strategic relationships, protect our
economy from cyber attacks, and defend our intellectual property.

Taking the side of human rights and freedom: I won't
roll out the red carpet for an authoritarian president. Instead,
I'll name, honor, and visit dissidents and persecuted religious
minorities.

Click here to learn more about my plan.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43642537:18951253942:m:3:1349778030:39134F06B30F35C457E16B19CEC790E4:r

China undoubtedly wants the 21st century to be a Chinese
century, and that would be a very ugly thing under this Chinese
regime.

The right policies can instead make it a New American
Century. I hope you'll join me in making it happen.

Sincerely,

Marco Rubio

DONATE

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Too many emails? Click here to receive updates less often:
https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe: https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

On China, that means: Restoring our military presence in the Pacific: I'll rebuild our military, deploy more forces and conduct more patrols there, and strengthen our regional alliances. Making us competitive with China: I'll promote free trade to strengthen our strategic relationships, protect our economy from cyber attacks, and defend our intellectual property. Taking the side of human rights and freedom: I won't roll out the red carpet for an authoritarian president. Instead, I'll name, honor, and visit dissidents and persecuted religious minorities. Click here to learn more about my plan. China undoubtedly wants the 21st century to be a Chinese century, and that would be a very ugly thing under this Chinese regime. Sincerely, Marco Rubio DONATE Paid for by Marco Rubio for President This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com Too many emails? Click here to receive updates less often:

name: Rand Paul
subject: I need you to take care of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear :

What if we don't tackle our ballooning $18.3 TRILLION debt?

What if we don't secure our borders, repeal ObamaCare, and stop Big Government politicians in BOTH parties from whittling away even more at our cherished Bill of Rights?

, if we elect another Big Government charlatan in EITHER party, I'm afraid our country is going to experience the disastrous answers to these questions.

So today, with the critical August 31st End of Month deadline rapidly approaching, I'm counting on your most generous financial support to help me take the "Next Step."

**[Will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 at once](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30041310:28796544070:m:1:879035888:AF5DB345AC072EF626895D5112CD3A33:r)**?

, thanks to your support, you and I have already seen many big successes during my campaign for President.

First, you and I burst out of the gates posting poll numbers leading Hillary Clinton in five key swing states President Obama won in both 2008 and 2012\.

Then, we forced the NSA's outrageous and unconstitutional domestic spying programs to expire -- even in the face of outrage from spy state apologists in BOTH parties.

I unveiled my massive Fair and Flat Tax Plan to blow up our tax code, start over, return $2 TRILLION to the American people over ten years and create at least 1.4 million new jobs.

Then, you and I forced Members of the U.S. Senate to vote on finally DEFUNDING Planned Parenthood so the American people can clearly see who stands with them, and who stands with the radical abortionists who abort unborn babies, dismember them and sell their body parts for profit!

And, I faced down perhaps the biggest spy state apologist of them all during the first presidential debate in my full-throated defense of the Constitution's Fourth Amendment!

Grassroots energy is high everywhere I go.

But now is when the rubber meets the road.

Now is when I need to turn that grassroots energy into an unstoppable political force ready to catapult my campaign to the Republican nomination for President!

, I didn't run for the U.S. Senate on an ego trip, because I wanted a new job or some high-powered insider hack thought I might make a good candidate.

I ran because I feared for the future of my country.

I don't want our country to experience any more pain from years upon years of Big Government policies.

But I know that's what's in store for us if we nominate yet another fake conservative.

, I ran as an apologetic Tea Party candidate for the U.S. Senate in 2010.

I've done something most politicians don't. I've delivered. I've fought the status quo with everything I have as a U.S. Senator.

Now, I'm taking the next step and running for President as an unapologetic defender of liberty and limited government.

**[But I'm counting on you to help me win](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30041310:28796544070:m:1:879035888:AF5DB345AC072EF626895D5112CD3A33:r)**.

, this month's Next Step Fundraising Blitz is critical -- not just because reporters and political "experts" are sniffing around my campaign to see if I can really mobilize the grassroots support necessary to win.

It's critical because to build the on-the-ground campaign presence I need to win, I need to pay for all the campaign stops, phone banks, bumper stickers, pizza for volunteers and TV ads.

**[So will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30041310:28796544070:m:1:879035888:AF5DB345AC072EF626895D5112CD3A33:r)**?

Then, will you **[forward this email](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=5226261&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=b43e10886738b5dd13821b5cec1e48dd)** to everyone you know and ask them to please give as generously as possible to my Next Step Fundraising Blitz right away?

Your support will make a massive impact. So please act at once!

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30041310:28796544070:m:1:879035888:AF5DB345AC072EF626895D5112CD3A33:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30041311:28796544070:m:1:879035888:AF5DB345AC072EF626895D5112CD3A33:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30041312:28796544070:m:1:879035888:AF5DB345AC072EF626895D5112CD3A33:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30041313:28796544070:m:1:879035888:AF5DB345AC072EF626895D5112CD3A33:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isWpsmwmNy). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osWpsmwmNy)

name: Tom Dickens
subject: Need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter - we're days away from our end of summer fundraising push and we're just short of our goal.
**[We need you to chip in $5, $25, or even $50 in order to hit our mark. Will you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43645873:18954979889:m:1:1516426255:DE7DBDEA98332545B25525E3CA4016F1:r)**

It's more important than ever to show that people know **_Chris Christie will tell it like it is and make the tough decisions needed to move our country forward_**.

We can't do this without you, Peter.
Can we count on you to ensure we hit our end of summer goal? If so, **[please chip in $5 or more today! Your support is critical](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43645873:18954979889:m:1:1516426255:DE7DBDEA98332545B25525E3CA4016F1:r)**.

Thanks,
Tom Dickens
****
****
****

| |
---|---|---

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Let me know when your birthday is
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
I want to write you a birthday note. | I really value your support -- and I never like to miss the birthday of someone important to me.

[**Just let me know when your birthday is, and I'll make sure to send you a note on your big day!**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMzNzczNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNzMxNDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

We're part of a team together. We're going to work hard and have a lot of fun through it all. Part of that is taking some time to celebrate and appreciate each other, and that’s what I’d like to do on your birthday.

**Let me know when your big day is:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/your-birthday-card/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMzNzczNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNzMxNDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks so much,

Hillary

P.S. If there’s anyone else you know who’d want in on this,**[you can add them here as well!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMzNzczNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNzMxNDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjMzNzczNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNzMxNDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMzNzczNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNzMxNDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMzNzczNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNzMxNDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMzNzczNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNzMxNDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMzNzczNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNzMxNDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMzNzczNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNzMxNDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Big month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend,

This has been a busy month for us. My opponent launched an ad against me. The National Republican Senatorial Committee spent the month smearing my record.

And all the while, Republicans in Congress are inching closer and closer to either defunding Planned Parenthood or shutting down the government.

**We need to end the month on a high note -- by reaching our $25,000 goal.** But we only have 2 days left to get there.

[_**Give $5, $10, or whatever you can to help.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d2/738133e4/3acbedbd/7f96a681/2058962607/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150828?refcode=pme150828_m&recurring=true")

Protecting Social Security and Medicare. Protecting women's right to choose. Protecting investments in schools, infrastructure, and the environment.

Those are the priorities we should have in Congress. **Unfortunately, the Republican-controlled Congress is doing the exact opposite.**

Democrats only need 4 seats to take back control in the Senate. _And the path to control runs straight through Florida._

_National Journal_ rated us one of the top ten Senate races in the country. [**Help us build the grassroots strength we need to win by hitting our $25,000 goal in the next 48 hours -- give what you can now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d2/738133e4/3acbedbd/7f96a681/2058962607/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150828?refcode=pme150828_m&recurring=true")

Thank you for sticking with me.

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d2/738133e4/3acbedbd/7f96a682/2058962607/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

Protecting investments in schools, infrastructure, and the environment. Those are the priorities we should have in Congress. Unfortunately, the Republican-controlled Congress is doing the exact opposite. Democrats only need 4 seats to take back control in the Senate. And the path to control runs straight through Florida. National Journal rated us one of the top ten Senate races in the country. "" Thank you for sticking with me. Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""

name: Rand Paul
subject: Video:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

I've been campaigning out west this week in the crucial caucus states scheduled for March.

The crowds have been large - hundreds of patriots attended each event - and they enthusiastically responded to my plan to defeat the Washington Machine.

Everyone knows how important Iowa and New Hampshire are.

But my campaign is built for the long haul and these western caucus states are the next step after the early voting states hold their nominating contests.

And now I need your help to make sure my campaign has the resources necessary to translate on-the-ground enthusiasm into the grassroots muscle necessary to win.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to chip in a contribution of $20.16 before the August 31st deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049026:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, establishment politicians in BOTH parties have joined in an unholy alliance to enable government to borrow a million dollars a minute and trample the Bill of Rights.

And the folks I meet on the campaign trail are FED UP with the failed status quo that protects the well connected and leaves everyday Americans out in the cold.

The grassroots isn't going to take it anymore and neither am I.

I proved that when I filibustered for over ten-and-half hours to force Barack Obama's illegal NSA spying to expire.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049026:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r)

But it wasn't just me out there.

Hundreds of thousands of Americans rallied to "Stand with Rand" and you and I scored an important first victory in taking our country back.

And now I'm counting on you to help me take the next step.

I'm counting on you to help my campaign raise the resources necessary to convert the passion I saw on the trail this week into voters.

**[So please agree to chip in a contribution of $20.16 before the August 31st deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049026:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049027:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049028:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049029:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049030:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049026:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049026:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049031:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049032:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30049033:28799552755:m:1:879035888:9C55F4D83191716ABE444D2B9D8BE81B:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: Kyle Jarrett
subject: You know we can count on Chris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend -- Did you hear about Ted Cruz's plan to shut down the government over funding for Planned Parenthood? It's 2013 all over again!

Two years ago Chris led the House floor fight against Ted Cruz's extremist tactics, and you know we can count on him to do it again. That's why we have to make sure we send Chris to the Senate, where he'll be an effective leader who actually gets things done.

Will you help by making a contribution to our campaign today?

**[Click here to give before the August 31 deadline- finishing the summer strong is crucial! ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f27/70cdc2ba/47a45702/3957370/2788943704/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em082815ND&amount=5.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+give+before+the+August+31+&utm_campaign=em082815ND&source=em082815ND")**

Thanks,

Kyle Jarrett
Digital Director
Van Hollen for Senate

_\----Original Message ----_ Friend,
It's happening all over again. Ted Cruz is trying to steer us toward another government shutdown--this time to defund Planned Parenthood. Only now he won't even own up to it.

Check out this _Washington Post_ headline from Tuesday: **" Ted Cruz: If the government shuts down over my Planned Parenthood funding fight, it's not my fault"** That's just unbelievable. We can't let reckless and irresponsible legislators like Cruz hold our government hostage just so they can wage their numbskull attacks on women and working families. It's time we stand together and say enough is enough!

I promise to lead the fight to stop them -- just like I've done before -- but I'm going to need your help. This is a critical moment in our campaign because once the summer ends, things will really start to heat up. We've got to be ready, and that means having all the resources necessary to fight back against Tea Party extremists when they set their sights on Maryland.
**[Will you contribute now, before the end-of-month deadline on August 31? I need your support today to continue standing up for our shared values in the Senate.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f27/70cdc2ba/47a45702/3957306/2788943704/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em082815ND&amount=5.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+contribute+now+before+the+endof&utm_campaign=em082815ND&source=em082815ND")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $3 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f27/70cdc2ba/47a45702/395731e/2788943704/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em082815nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+3+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em082815ND&source=em082815ND")** **[Donate $15 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f27/70cdc2ba/47a45702/3957317/2788943704/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em082815nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+15+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em082815ND&source=em082815ND")** **[Donate $25 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f27/70cdc2ba/47a45702/395732b/2788943704/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em082815nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+25+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em082815ND&source=em082815ND")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f27/70cdc2ba/47a45702/395733e/2788943704/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em082815nd&amount=5.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em082815ND&source=em082815ND")** When Cruz caused a shutdown two years ago in a misguided attempt to defund the Affordable Care Act, **I led the fight on the House floor to get our government back up and running.** And if Cruz and his Tea Party allies try again, **I 'll be right there fighting back every step of the way.**

We've got to have real leadership in the U.S. Senate to counter Tea Party numbskulls like Ted Cruz, and I want to be there working hard for Marylanders to actually get things done. But I simply can't win without your help.

**[Please consider a donation today--before the deadline hits in just 4 days. Believe me, any amount will make a difference!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f27/70cdc2ba/47a45702/3957334/2788943704/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em082815ND&amount=5.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Please+consider+a+donation+todaymdashbef&utm_campaign=em082815ND&source=em082815ND")**

Thanks for your generosity and support,

Chris Van Hollen
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f27/70cdc2ba/47a45702/39573ca/2788943704/VEsO/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em082815ND&source=em082815ND") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Rick Santorum
subject: FW: We’re not taking anyone for granted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| Friend --

I wanted to make sure you heard the news.

On Sunday, I’m headed back to Iowa for the final stretch of my road to all 99 counties.

Can you help me get across the finish line? **By donating $2.69, you can help put a gallon of gas in our tank** and help us bring our message of fighting for hard-working families, stopping illegal immigration, and defeating Radical Islam to Iowans.

[**http://ricksantorum.com/iowa_donate**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/iowa_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1013&n=1)

God bless (and game on!),

Rick

Sent from my iPhone

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Walt Rogers, Team Santorum
Date: Thu, Aug 26, 2015 at 11:24 AM
Subject: We’re not taking anyone for granted
To: Rick Santorum

| | [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=68cd086a9a7b1ba41b82fcef117894ff&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1010&n=1&test_email=1&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1013&n=2)
---
Rick --

Achieving the “Full Grassley,” named after U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley (who visits each Iowa county each year), is no small feat. Traveling across Iowa and meeting voters in each of its 99 counties is a serious commitment, and one that Rick has made and kept in 2015.

During the 2012 campaign, Rick visited each of Iowa's 99 counties, completing the “Full Grassley” in early November 2011. This campaign, he’s working even harder: his pace and commitment to Iowa voters this cycle has him two months ahead of his victorious pace of four years ago.

[**To celebrate this huge campaign milestone, we’re launching a “Full Grassley” money bomb on September 1st.** ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/full_grassley?e=68cd086a9a7b1ba41b82fcef117894ff&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1010&n=2&test_email=1&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1013&n=3)

Unlike other candidates, Rick isn’t just chasing after TV cameras and campaigning in big cities. He’s also out campaigning in small towns and rural areas. That’s how we’re going to win this campaign — going person-by-person and taking no one for granted.

Will you help us send a message to the mainstream media that it’s the hard work at the grassroots level — not big money Super PACs — that’ll decide the outcome of this election by chipping in $9.90 or whatever you can on September 1?

[**http://www.ricksantorum.com/full_grassley**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/full_grassley?e=68cd086a9a7b1ba41b82fcef117894ff&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1010&n=3&test_email=1&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1013&n=4)

Walt Rogers
Iowa State Director
Team Santorum

[ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contribute?e=68cd086a9a7b1ba41b82fcef117894ff&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1010&n=4&test_email=1&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1013&n=5)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1013&n=6).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1013&n=7) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1013&n=8).
